holdings.n: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation

holdings.infoBox: FLCC is an equity ETF with a total of 149 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 7.43%, NVIDIA at 7.19%, Alphabet at 5.80%, Amazon.com at 3.70%, and Broadcom at 3.53%.

overview.description: The Federated Hermes MDT Large Cap Core ETF (FLCC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, investing primarily in large-cap US companies within the Russell 1000 Index. The fund aims for capital growth, utilizing a quantitative model focused on maximizing returns and risk management. FLCC was launched on Jul 30, 2024 and is issued by Federated Hermes.
